title: Debate closing statement
subtitle: End with synthesis and conviction.
overview: A closing should be memorable but not dramatic.
Restate the main reason and implication.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: That is why I maintain that...

items.es: Para concluir, no estamos discutiendo solo una medida concreta.
items.en: To conclude, we are not discussing only one concrete measure.

items.es: Lo esencial es qué tipo de sociedad queremos construir.
items.en: The essential thing is what kind of society we want to build.

items.es: Si queremos más igualdad, debemos invertir en oportunidades reales.
items.en: If we want more equality, we must invest in real opportunities.

items.es: Por eso mantengo que la educación práctica es una necesidad, no un lujo.
items.en: That is why I maintain that practical education is a necessity, not a luxury.

items.es: El cambio puede ser gradual, pero debe empezar ahora.
items.en: The change can be gradual, but it must start now.
